titleStmt.title: SII 28.232: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 232. (A.R. No. 387 of 1913.) Eṟumbūr, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kadambavanēśvara temple, central shrine, west wall.

This inscription records that three śivabrāhmaṇas, who had kāṇi in the temple of Tiruvirāmīśvaramuḍaiya-Periyanāyanār in the Iṟumūr alias Vikkiramachōḻachcharuppēdimaṅgalam alias Eṟumbūr, a brahmadēyam in Mēṟkā-nāḍu in vaḍakarai Viruda-rāja-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, took over 96 sheep endowed for a perpetual lamp for the above-stated God by Oḻukarai-uḍaiyāṉ Vāsudēvan Periyān alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-mūvēndaveḷān of Araśūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu and undertook to supply one uḻakku of ghee daily and maintain the perpetual lamp from the month of Chittirai of that year cited. The same śivabrāhmaṇas also took over 14 cows endowed for the supply of curd for the God and milk for bath of that God (it is not stated as to who endowed the cows but apparently it was the same individual as the one who endowed the sheep for the perpetual lamp) and undertook to supply 3 nāḻi of curd and 2 nāḻi of milk (daily) and maintain the stipulated services from that month [of Chittirai] of that same year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī* . tiripuvaṉaccakaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarā
ja tevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu ti
rumuṉaippāṭi nāṭṭup kai Aracūr Oḻukaṟai U
ṭaiyān vāsutevan periyānāṉa tirucciṟṟam
pala muventaveḷān pakkal vaṭakarai virutarāja payaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkā nāṭ
ṭu bramateyam Uṟumurāṉa vikkiramacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalamāṉa Eṟumpūr tiruvirāmi
śvaramuṭaiya periya nāyanārkku tirunantāviḷakkukku Ikkoyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civap
pirāmaṇar kavucikan vikkecuvaran comatevapaṭṭaneṉum kāśyapan tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyān
tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaneṉum pāratuvāci cūritevan Āḻkkoḷḷavantān paṭṭane
num Āka Immuvom Ivar pakkal tirunantāviḷakkukku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu to
ṇṇūṟṟu Āṟu Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ivvāṇṭai citti
rai māsamutal nāḷoṉṟukku ney Uḻakkāka cantirātittavaṟ Erikkakkaṭavomākavum
tayiramutukkum Āṭi Aruḷa pālukkum Ivvāṇṭai Immāsamutal kaikkoṇṭa pa
cu patinālu Ippacu patinālum kaikkoṇṭu Amutupaṭi munnāḻi tayiramutu cantirā
tittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomākavum nittam Iruṉāḻiyāl Āṭi Aruḷak kaṭavatā
kavum Āka tirunantāviḷakkukkum tayir Amutukkum Āṭiyaruḷa pālukkum
kaikkoṇṭa pacu patinālum Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟum kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomā
ṉom Ikkoyilil civappirāmaṇa kavucikan vikkecuran comatevapaṭṭanenum kāśyapan tiruvaṇṇāmalai
Uṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanenum pāratuvāci cūratevan Āḻkkoḷḷa vantān paṭṭanenum Immu
vomum Ippaṭikku Ivai kavucikan vikkecuvarar comateva paṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan tiruvaṇṇāmalai Uṭaiyān
tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratuvāci cūrya tevan Āḻkkoḷḷa vantān paṭṭan Eḻuttu .
In continuation stones in the same structure the following lines which apparently form part of another record are found

Ittevar paḻan tevatāṉamāṉa nilam kaṇṭarātittavatikku kiḻakku viracoḻa vāykkālukku teṟkku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟ
ṟu munṟāñ catirattu nilam Orumāvaraiyum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Ira
ṇṭāñ catirattu nilam Orumāvaraiyum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇ
ṭāñ catirattu kollai nilam muṉṟu māvum muṉṟāñ catirattu nilam
Araikkāṇiyum nālā(ā)ñcatirattu nilam Orumāvaraikkāṇiyu
m Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu kollai nilam Iraṇ
ṭu māvum Ivatikku kiḻakku [jayaṅ]koṇṭacoḻavāykkāllu
paṭṭa comayājiyeṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ivvūr tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭace ṉ Ātittaṉeṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ivvūr kā paṉ Āritaṉ Āracāraṅkan
Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ kāmakkāṇit tirukkaṇṇapuramuṭaiyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉen ṭi Aṟiveṉ Āritaṉ kaṇṇaṉ śrīkaṇṇaṉeṉ paṭṭaṉe
tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cāttamaṅkalattu veḷa ṟiveṉ vaāṉamāteviccaruppetimaṅkalattuk kaṇṭi
ṟāñcatirattu kollai nilam nṟu mā śvarar pakkal Iṟai draivyaṅ koṇṭamaiyil cantrātittavaṟ Iṟai I
llai nilam Eṭṭumāvum Āka nilam panniraṇ kkaṭavomāṉom Uṟumur sabhaiyom Ārātikku nampikku panmāyaśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 28.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
